quiz.question:
Black pushes on the queenside. 

You want to play Nxf5, but are you losing the knight after ...b3?

answers.text: No, there are a few ways to save the knight

feedback.text: Good job! We can trade on b3 and move our queen to d3 next.

distractors.text: Yes, ...b3 removes the defender (our queen) of our knight on f5.

feedback.text: This tactic doesn't work for Black!

distractors.text: Yes, but there is enough compensation for the knight.

feedback.text: Black has a dangerous attack on the kingside, so losing the knight would not give us any compensation.
